guatapeAccommodations.basicDesc: We offer a variety of accommodations to suit your needs. Whether you're looking for a basic stay or a luxurious experience, we have options for everyone.
guatapeAccommodations.basicStats: Our basic accommodations provide a comfortable and affordable option for travelers seeking a simple yet enjoyable stay.
guatapeAccommodations.specialDesc: Our special accommodations provide a unique experience with added amenities and services to make your stay memorable.
